component.name: PulsePad GTK
component.summary: Trigger audio pads for live playback

description.p: PulsePad GTK is a Linux desktop soundboard for assigning sounds to pads and triggering them during live production, podcasting, streaming, theatre, tabletop gaming, and radio-style cart playback.
It supports multi-pad playback, trimming, reverse playback, per-pad settings, groups, MIDI input when built with RtMidi, and board import/export packages.
